reports.title: Stags fall to Kensington at the top of the table
reports.summary: A tough afternoon away to the league leaders. The Stags battled hard but Kensington's quality showed in front of goal. M.Wood was named Man of the Match for a string of saves that kept the score down. The lads bounce back next week against Ryefield.

reports.title: Stags edge thriller against Samurai
reports.summary: A proper end-to-end Sunday League scrap. Goals from Chahal, Jones, Richards and Z.Rogers (MOTM) saw the Stags hold on for a vital three points. Top performance.

reports.title: Tom Richards seals it at Hounslow
reports.summary: Away day grit. O'Toole opened the scoring before the home side levelled, but Richards' second-half strike won it. Norman bagged the MOTM award for a commanding performance at the back.
